name: Netris 2
description: The model NETRIS®2 IoT-capable WIKA radio unit is used wherever centralised, web-based, remote monitoring of measuring instrument data is required. The EX radio unit receives the data via the two analogue 4 ... 20 mA input signals. The fully encapsulated instrument with IP55 ingress protection transmits the received data continuously to a cloud via configurable data packets with LoRaWAN®.
author: Akenza AG
